title: VS Code: pckg registry, platform-spec, and book deep links
body:
Extend beskid_vscode beyond cli-latest LSP bootstrap: platform-spec deep links, pckg API reference from registry, and status-bar pckg health.

## Landed

- `beskid.docs.specBaseUrl` + `beskid.docs.bookBaseUrl` settings
- LSP `beskid.symbol.getDocumentationUri` routes corelib sources to `/platform-spec/core-library/`
- Registry panel API docs links; status-bar pckg connection health
- Extension unit tests for symbol docs URL builders

## Remaining

- Open VSX publish smoke after merge
- Diagnostic → spec anchor links (LSP publishDiagnostics)

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Catalog tip:** [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf) (2026-06-07)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `vscode-editor`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-vscode-pckg-docs`

subtasks.text: Platform-spec deep links in symbol documentation
